articles.title: Disney opens World of Frozen in Paris as new CEO showcases the empire that made him
articles.description:
“Storytelling is fundamental to everything that we do, whether that’s on screen or stage, in our theme parks, on our cruise ships, or even at home.”

The post Disney opens World of Frozen in Paris as new CEO showcases the empire that made him appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Disney opened World of Frozen in Paris, enhancing global brand presence.
New CEO Bob Chapek emphasizes storytelling across all Disney platforms.
Boston residents may see increased tourism as Disney expands its attractions.
